query:
UPDATE project_task_board_items
            SET pending_question = $2,
                status = CASE
                    WHEN $2::jsonb IS NOT NULL
                         AND status NOT IN ('completed', 'cancelled')
                        THEN 'needs_clarification'
                    WHEN $2::jsonb IS NULL
                         AND status = 'needs_clarification'
                        THEN 'in_progress'
                    ELSE status
                END,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = $1
